title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Rosmarinus officinalis, also known as rosemary, essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's ability to combat bacterial growth and reduce inflammation in the gums makes it an effective natural remedy for periodontal disease.
